Home.heroTitle: Daily essentials from trusted neighborhood stores
Home.heroDescription: Browse nearby sellers, compare local inventory, and shop fresh groceries and daily needs through a fast Indian-market checkout flow.
Home.benefitShopNearbyBody: Find stores serving your area and order from sellers your neighborhood already knows.
Home.benefitFreshBody: Browse groceries and daily needs from local sellers with practical inventory updates.
Home.benefitMobileBody: Add {brand} to your home screen for a focused app-like ordering experience.
Home.popularSubtitle: Start with local sellers and build your basket around what is available near you.
Home.emptyTitle: Stores are being prepared for your area.
Home.emptyBody: Check available sellers and start browsing as stores come online.
Home.previewTitle: Fresh from a store near you
Home.previewSetLocation: Set your location for nearby stores
Home.previewSetLocationCard: Set your location to see nearby products
Home.sellerBandBody: Bring your catalog online, manage local inventory, and reach nearby customers through {brand}.

Login.subtitleEmail: Enter your email to sign in or create an account
Login.subtitleName: One last step — what should we call you?
Login.consent: I agree to the <terms>Terms of Service</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>

Sell.metaDescription: Apply to sell on {brand} and bring your neighborhood store online for nearby shoppers.
Sell.heroTitle: Scale Your Business. Go Digital. Grow Faster.
Sell.heroBody: Join the Digital India movement. Register your free business account today, start selling instantly, and take control of your future.
Sell.reviewNote: Get ready for success. We ensure compliance and empower your brand with a strong digital presence.
Sell.valueLocalReachBody: Show your store to nearby shoppers who already look for daily essentials in your area.
Sell.valueInventoryBody: Choose which products appear, set prices, and manage stock levels for your own storefront.
Sell.valueVerifiedBody: Keep the marketplace trusted with a simple review step before your store goes live.
Sell.valueCommerceBody: Built for neighborhood businesses that sell across kirana, pharmacy, electronics, and general retail.
Sell.step1Body: Confirm your identity and email to ensure secure participation.
Sell.step2Body: Provide the necessary information about your business for review.
Sell.step3Body: Our team will connect with you to ensure all compliance requirements are met.
Sell.step4Body: Customize your store by adding products, defining pricing, and managing inventory.
Sell.previewTitle: See the basics before you go live
Sell.previewBody: The seller dashboard keeps the focus on total products, store status, inventory, stock, availability, and storefront visibility.
Sell.faq1A: No. Applications are reviewed before approval, and most are completed within 1-2 business days.
Sell.faq2A: Keep your verified email and mobile number, business details, GST number, FSSAI license, and bank account information ready.
Sell.faq3Q: What if my application is rejected?
Sell.faq3A: You can fix the missing details or documents and submit the application again from the seller signup flow.
Sell.faq4A: You can publish your store, add products, manage stock, and set availability for nearby shoppers.
Sell.faq5Q: Can I control products and prices?
Sell.faq5A: Yes. You decide which products are visible, how they are priced, and when items should be marked unavailable.
Sell.faq6A: Neighborhood stores such as kiranas, pharmacies, electronics shops, and general retail businesses can apply.
Sell.finalTitle: Ready to bring your store online?
Sell.finalBody: Start your seller application and keep your business details ready.
Sell.why1Desc: Make your store visible online and capture customer attention — your digital destination.
Sell.why2Desc: Connect your customers; your digital presence keeps loyal customers close and attracts new ones.
Sell.why3Desc: Decide what to showcase, set your prices, and manage stock in real time — your shop, your rules.
Sell.why4Desc: Verified sellers inspire confidence, turning first-time buyers into repeat customers.
Sell.why5Desc: Grow beyond your street while staying true to your neighbourhood's identity.
Sell.howSubtitle: A simple path from signup to selling
Sell.step5Body: Once approved, your shop goes live — publish products, manage availability, and begin selling confidently.

q1.question: How do I track my order?
q1.answer: Open the order from Orders to see its current status and timeline.

q2.question: How do I change my delivery address?
q2.answer: Manage saved addresses from the Addresses section; pick one at checkout.

q4.question: How do I cancel an order?
q4.answer: Pending orders can be cancelled from the order detail page.

q5.question: Why didn't I receive my OTP?
q5.answer: Check your spam folder or wait 60 seconds and request a new code.
